no_changes_rationale:
status: open
reason: Project verification is blocked before this docs-only bead can be committed. `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` fails on pre-existing out-of-scope `clippy::result_large_err` diagnostics in `crates/axon-core/src/auth.rs` at lines 196, 259, and 352, and `crates/axon-core/src/guardrails.rs` at lines 272 and 308. The bead's named scope is `docs/helix/03-test/consumer-workload-gate.md`, and the execution instructions forbid modifying out-of-scope files or committing while the required lint gate is red. Retry after the axon-core clippy diagnostics are fixed, then add the consumer workload gate contract document and rerun the acceptance commands plus the project gates.
